title: What the River Forgot
author: Barış Kısır
short_description: A retired marine biologist is pulled back into her past when bodies of missing fishermen wash ashore along a remote Oregon coast, each one with gill slits carved into their necks.
long_description: A retired marine biologist is pulled back into her past when bodies of missing fishermen wash ashore along a remote Oregon coast, each one with gill slits carved into their necks.
